creator: ietf-dane@dukhovni.org
text: Thanks, much appreciated.  After these are burned in in *current*, if there is a possibility of a backports to extant stable releases, that'd be great.  It would be nice to reduce the wait-time before application-layer work-arounds can be removed by a couple of years.  It'll still probably be *at least* 5 years before GHC can assume that all supported FreeBSD systems are patched...
